resubmit_guidance: Prompt v2: 'plain white painted LINES and hash marks only', 'single plain white 50-yard LINE with NO painted numbers', explicit negatives (NO yard numbers/numerals on grass or track/lane numbers; no goalposts/benches/pylons/hurdles), camera elevated full-field. D10-adjacent lesson: '50-yard marker' reads as 'paint numbers' to NB2.
